demographics.living_situation: lives at home with both parents, who provide all of his care; fully dependent on them for feeding and mobility

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He choked on his drink, turned blue around the lips, and now his breathing is very noisy and labored.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly during a drink about two hours ago — he went blue for a moment and his breathing still isn't right.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly about two hours ago, during a drink of fluid
symptom_narrative.duration: about two hours, and his breathing is still noisy
symptom_narrative.character: he coughed and choked hard on his drink, went blue around the lips for a moment, and since then his breathing has been noisy, wet and rattly and he's working harder than usual to breathe
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really frightening — for a moment we thought he couldn't breathe
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: his throat and chest / his breathing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst at the moment he choked; still noisy and not fully settled since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: he calmed a little after the coughing but it hasn't cleared properly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the drink set it off — he has real trouble swallowing fluids
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: noisy wet breathing, ribs sucking in a bit, looked frightened and cried
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he often has trouble swallowing and has coughed and spluttered on feeds before, but this felt worse and the blue lips scared us
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he depends on us for all his feeding and can't tell us what's wrong

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: he has CHARGE syndrome — we've known since he was a baby
past_medical_history.how_managed: modified feeding techniques and regular specialist follow-up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: he has a lot of trouble swallowing because of a problem with the nerves that work his swallow and palate
he was born with a blocked nasal passage that was fixed with surgery
he had a connection between his windpipe and food pipe that was repaired as a baby
he had heart surgery as a baby and has a scar on his chest
he is profoundly deaf and doesn't speak — he lets us know things by crying
he has a difference in one of his eyes (a gap in the coloured part)
he is small for his age and his growth and development have been slow

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: thickening powder we add to his drinks to make them safer to swallow

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with both parents who provide all care; uses modified thickened feeds; the family keeps a suction machine at home

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened parents describing what they can see and hear; the child cannot speak for himself

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: known global developmental delay and poor growth for age; profoundly deaf and non-verbal, communicates distress only by crying

objective_data_offered.value: he went blue around his lips for a few moments while he was choking, then the colour came back
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: brief colour change observed by frightened parents during the episode; not measured

objective_data_offered.value: his breathing is noisy, wet and rattly and you can hear it across the room
his chest and the spaces between his ribs are sucking in a little each time he breathes in
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parents' description of what they can see; degree of recession cannot be graded remotely

objective_data_offered.value: he is awake but looks anxious and is crying

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent-recalled weight; not measured at this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: we have a suction machine at home but it wasn't switched on when it happened
